papers.title: Learning Whole-Body Humanoid Locomotion via Motion Generation and Motion Tracking
papers.summary: 提出结合扩散模型运动生成与强化学习运动跟踪的全身人形机器人 locomotion 框架，实现地形感知的实时运动自适应和鲁棒控制。

papers.title: A Rapid Deployment Pipeline for Autonomous Humanoid Grasping Based on Foundation Models
papers.summary: 该论文提出了一种基于基础模型的端到端人形机器人快速部署pipeline，将新物体的部署周期从1-2天缩短至约30分钟，实现从数据采集到抓取执行的全流程自动化。

papers.title: Towards Universal Skeleton-Based Action Recognition
papers.summary: 本文提出一种基于Transformer的通用异构骨架动作识别方法，通过构建大规模HOV数据集和多粒度运动-文本对齐机制，实现开放词汇下的跨源骨架动作识别。

papers.title: Leveraging VR Robot Games to Facilitate Data Collection for Embodied Intelligence Tasks
papers.summary: 提出基于Unity的VR游戏化数据采集框架，通过程序化场景生成和VR人型机器人控制，实现具身智能任务的大规模高效数据收集。

companyNews.title: Tesla’s Optimus humanoid robot greets runners, poses for photos at Boston Marathon - Interesting Engineering
Robots, Competition and Total Addressable Markets. - Blain's Morning Porridge
companyNews.summary: **关键信息：** 该分析指出Tesla的Optimus机器人需在价格与性能上与全球竞争对手抗衡，以争夺人形机器人巨大的潜在市场。

companyNews.title: A SpaceX IPO Could Shift Attention Away From Tesla, and Dip Buyers Should Be Ready - 24/7 Wall St.
companyNews.summary: SpaceX IPO可能分流投资者对Tesla的关注，或影响其机器人项目Optimus的资源投入。

companyNews.title: Tesla Unveils Optimus Robot Gen 2: Tesla-Designed Fingertip Sensors, Actuators and Ten Other Improvements [Video] - Not a Tesla App
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉发布Optimus Gen 2人形机器人，配备自研指尖传感器和执行器等十项升级，显示其从原型向商业化加速迈进。

companyNews.title: Tesla leader believes Shanghai factory operations will play a role in robot mass production - AP News
